description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code in a repository. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and weekly on a schedule. It should use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions to repository contents and write permissions to security events. The workflow should utilize a matrix strategy to analyze C++ and Python languages, hardening the runner, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, attempting to autobuild compiled languages, and then performing CodeQL analysis.
